---
title: "data_import"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

How to load file with **readr**

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

Focus on **plain-text rectangular files: CSV**

```{r}
students <- read_csv("students_file")
```

or

```{r}
students <- read.csv("https://pos.it/r4ds-students-csv")
students
```
